title: Cyclic quadrilaterals and smooth Jordan curves
abstract: For every smooth Jordan curve $γ$ and cyclic quadrilateral $Q$ in the Euclidean plane, we show that there exists an orientation-preserving similarity taking the vertices of $Q$ to $γ$. The proof relies on the theorem of Polterovich and Viterbo that an embedded Lagrangian torus in $\mathbb{C}^2$ has minimum Maslov number 2.
